name: Lorraine Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 breasts of cooked, skinned, minced chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove crusts from bread and place in a small saucepan.
2. Cover with milk and bring to boil. Set aside and allow to cool slightly.
3. Pound minced chicken, almonds, and hard-boiled yolks in a mortar until smooth.
4. Gradually beat in the bread and milk mixture.
5. Stir in the chicken stock, then pass through a sieve into a saucepan.
6. Bring to the boil, season with salt and pepper, add nutmeg and lemon juice.
7. Simmer for 10 minutes, then remove from heat.
8. Beat egg yolks with cream and blend three tablespoons of the hot soup.
9. Stir the mixture into the soup and heat gently for 2 or 3 minutes.
- Do not allow to boil.
10. Serve garnished with diced chicken.
